name: SkyWater Technology, Inc
summary: PART I Overview SkyWater Technology, Inc., together with its consolidated subsidiaries, is a U.S.-based, independent, pure-play semiconductor foundry providing foundational-node manufacturing, advanced technology development, and advanced packaging services through an integrated, multi-site operating model.
